item.title: M-VAVE Rechargeable Wireless MIDI Pedal With APP Controller 4 Button MIDI Foot Pedal - $36.09 (FREE)
item.description:
Packing List:

  • 1 x Controller
  • 1 x Charging Cable
  • 1 x User Manual


Features:

  • Portable MIDI foot controller pedal is small and exquisite, with easy-to-use 4 foot switches
  • Wireless MIDI pedal with intelligent APP(CubeSuite) control, easy to operate, convenient to use
  • Bulit in 300mAh rechargeable lithium battery, charging for 2.5 hours, can be used for 12 hours
  • The display screen can directly feedback the commands you issued, intuitive and clear
  • Compatible with Wins, iOS, Android and other platforms

Specifications:

  • Material: Metal
  • Power Input: DC 5V
  • Working Current: 45mA
  • Battery: 300mAh
  • APP: CubeSuite
  • Item Size: 8.35 x 1.42 x 0.67in / 212 x 36 x 17mm
  • Item Weight: 8.34oz / 236g
  • Package Weight: 10.43oz / 295g
  • Package Size: 8.86 x 1.77 x 1.57in / 22.5 x 4.5 x 4cm

Posted By: Poprock Music Gear (Carson, CA, United States) on July 11, 2025 at 03:03 AM

item.title: DemonFx Revelation 3 Distortion With Toggle Mode Option FREE USA SHIP - $53.38 ($14.80)
item.description:
This is the new Revelation 3 Distortion.

A versatile and expressive Distortion response can be found here. The toggle option can get you a little more rounded response on Blue but still pounding effect, to an all out attack on Red. Always musical and not brittle but sharp and can bite. Also check out the Revelation 4 in this series for an even more aggressive stomp.

  • Note:
    Power supply not included.
    Please use a 9V DC power adapter whose polarity is negative center otherwise, the product may not work properly.

    Package List:
    1 * Effect Pedal
    1 * User Manual  (English)
    1 * Year warranty through our store

No Duty to Canada and USA

This item includes applicable import fees—you won’t pay anything extra after checkout

*****MY PRICE INCLUDES ALL TARIFFS******   
 FAST N' FREE USA Shipping  (typically about 5 or so days via UPS Mail Innovations and USPS Final Mile LAST MILE TRACKING)
Some items we ship FREE some we do not,  Reverb lets you know ( Temporary measure due to Global Trade Chaos)
**( About tracking, since USPS Ground Advantage now is LAST MILE tracking please do not worry about your item NOT tracking, if it shows your item is in Niagara Falls NY. Then I have done my job already and shipped it. While you think it is not moving, it actually is and at final mile it will track properly. )

**We Ship from our warehouse in Canada  (NOT from an Amazon warehouse and NOT rejects or returns, in fact we never re-sell returns that's what PAWN Shops are 4)         
CANADIAN DISTRIBUTOR

 Ships from Canada                             (depending on stock availability, may also ship from our Niagara Falls NY. location) 
**Just to be clear on DUTY, (regardless of what REVERB warns buyers of ) The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA is in place that allows US buyers to purchase/import in to the United States from Canada with NO Duty at all, State taxes are another story, some states charge a TAX some do not, BUT NO duty. ( NOTHING TO PAY AT THE DOOR ) We ship DDP meaning DUTY +Tariffs PRE paid by us to our shipper, Reverb's warning about paying @ the door does NOT apply to us. 4 now at least LOL

**Final thought. Please shop responsibly, every purchase you make from a North American seller helps OUR economy on THIS Continent.

item.title: PedalPCB Maleficent Mids 2022 - $79.95 (FREE)
item.description:
Lovies Guitars is pleased to present this 2022 PedalPCB Maleficent Mids, a high-quality guitar pedal designed for precise midrange tone shaping and versatility. This unit comes in a custom metal enclosure labeled "MID", giving it a unique look and added durability.

Condition is excellent, showing minimal signs of use. Fully functional and ready to integrate into any pedalboard or studio setup.

FEATURES:

Model: PedalPCB Maleficent Mids
Year: 2022
Enclosure: Custom metal, labeled "MID"
Type: Midrange Tone Shaping Pedal
Condition: Excellent – minimal wear, fully functional
Color: Custom Metal

Lovies Guitars Guarantee:

A versatile and durable pedal for shaping midrange frequencies, perfect for guitarists seeking precise control, unique tone, and reliable build quality.

Posted By: Robert's Gear Cave (Issaquah, WA, United States) on April 28, 2026 at 09:08 PM

item.title: Frost Giant Electronics Architect of Reality Dual Channel Preamp Pedal - Snowblind Edition - $249 (FREE)
item.description:
The Architect of Reality is a dual channel preamp pedal with the ability to mix the low and high gain channel together in the AOR mode for more tone tweaking ability with both channels on independent footswitches. It’s powered internally at 36v+ (9v boss style used) for more headroom and amp-like sensitivity.

The control panel on the Architect of Reality follows the same layout as most modern amps with and overall Presence, Bass, Mid and Treble, but for build cost and durability the pull boosts (of that 80’s classic amp) for each EQ band have been placed on toggle switches. In the first channel you control the Master Volume and Preamp Gain with a heavy crunch and rock feel like your favorite Heavy Rock classics with the feel of a familiar British build amp. Engaging the 2nd channel on the pedal pulls the AOR channel on the original amp and gives you the option of blending its gain with the first Preamp Gain for an over-the-top beast that can be tight for Thrash and Heavy Metal to the darker side of gain and sitting in the Doom and Stoner Metal territory

  • Hand made in Texas
  • Kemet and Nichicon HQ capacitors
  • Black Powder coat with a Gold Mist overlay
  • UV printed enclosure
  • 9v+ power (36v+ internally)

item.title: Crazy Tube Circuits Super Conductor *Authorized Dealer* FREE Shipping! - $215 (FREE)
item.description:
It's an all-analog design consisting of 4 different boost circuits inspired by one-knob wonders of the present and past.

The pedal has Rangemaster, EP-preamp, Micro Amp and Super Hard On circuits / voicings so that the user can find at least one setting to match with any amp / gear setup.

item.title: Digitech DOD Carcosa Fuzz - Used - $119 ($12)
item.description:
A buzzy fuzz that could be whipped right out of the 70's. The DigiTech DOD Carcosa Fuzz is a silicon fuzz that's bright and has a wild, cutting sound, but can be easily managed. Two modes and a Hi-Cut, Before and After controls, and an Output controls, make it easy to sway it to your liking.

Tested and ready to go! No accessories included unless otherwise noted.

Every instrument we sell has been professionally checked over and setup by our in-house technician to ensure optimal playability. We pack each order with care and ship promptly.

Mill River Music is a full-service shop in Western Massachusetts, proudly offering new, used, and vintage gear, plus repairs, and friendly advice. Reach out at (413) 505-0129 or with any questions!

International buyers are welcome — please message us for an accurate shipping quote before purchase.

Posted By: K's Gear (Newark, NJ, United States) on May 15, 2026 at 11:01 PM

item.title: BLACKHAWK BALROG DISTORTION MKII BLOODSPLATTER - $220 ($10)
item.description:
BLACKHAWK BALROG DISTORTION MKII

BLOODSPLATTER POWDER COAT

////////////////////////////////////////////

The BALROG DISTORTION MKII brings you the molten high gain fire of MOUNT DOOM through a trio of RC4558 opamps.

The concept of the design was to create a high gain preamp, distortion and overdrive in one.

The new MKII version brings everything from vintage overdrive to contemporary brutal death/black/hardcore tones. Deep lows which can be tightened with the "Depth" control, “throaty” mids and clear crisp highs.

Capable of sheer brutality into even the cleanest amp it can also deliver excellent mid gain overdrive tones as well. From huge overdrive boost to saturated gain it works perfectly for both tube and solid state amps.

////////////////////////////////////////////

The new MKII version includes the new "clickless true bypass" (or "soft touch") switch which uses a clickless momentary switch to trigger a relay as opposed to the standard mechanical method.

The MKII also uses a hybrid of SMD resistors/diodes/semiconductors/ICs but with the important parts (audio film caps, rarer discrete transistors and some ICs) still being through hole.

The audio/DC jacks and foot switches will still be handwired, only now they can be done much faster.

///////////////////////////////////////////////
“PRE-ORDER” simply means it is made to order. You purchase and then I build as quickly as possible.
Preorders take about two weeks but rarely can take up to four.
Every pedal is made by hand for YOU.
///////////////////////////////////////////////

Videos are available on Instagram @blackhawkamps

UNIVERSAL CONTROL TRANSLATOR FOR ALL BLACKHAWK PEDALS/AMPLIFIERS:

🔱=gain
M=midrange 
V=volume 
T=treble 
B=bass
D=depth

All BLACKHAWK pedals and preamps are true bypass and standard “one spot style” 9v, Negative tip, 2.1mm barrel.


///Legacy note: The V1 and V2 are the same circuit, the V2 is a printed circuit board where as the V1 was acid etched. Both are discontinued.

///V3 is the same circuit as the MKII only completely through hole parts and mechanical bypass.

item.title: Way Huge Russian Pickle Fuzz - X20467 - $129 ($19)
item.description:
Thank you for checking out this listing from PedalsToMetal. We specialize exclusively in used guitar effects and maintain one of the largest constantly refreshed selections of pedals available anywhere. New inventory is added daily, and every item is individually photographed so you can see the exact pedal you will receive. This pedal has been tested and confirmed fully functional. Please review all photos carefully for cosmetic condition, included accessories, and any signs of wear. Unless otherwise noted, everything included with this item is shown in the photos. Items not pictured are not included. We ship fast—most orders go out within one business day, and orders placed before 10am ET Monday through Thursday frequently ship same day. Thank you for supporting a small business built by musicians and pedal enthusiasts. Be sure to check out our other listings—we stock thousands of used pedals ranging from everyday favorites to rare and hard-to-find gear. Pedals are listed on multiple marketplaces and may be removed at any time.

Posted By: ELA Studios LLC (Spring City, PA, United States) on June 08, 2026 at 03:13 AM

item.title: Way Huge Doom Hammer Fuzz Pedal - Open Box - $139.99 (FREE) [18% price drop]
item.description:
The Way Huge Smalls Doom Hammer Fuzz will pound your ears with thick saturation worthy of high-desert riffage and dense walls of fuzz straight from a ‘90s fever dream.

The Long Story

The Way Huge Smalls Doom Hammer Fuzz will pound your ears with thick saturation worthy of high-desert riffage and dense walls of fuzz straight from a ‘90s fever dream. It all began in the original Way Huge garage lab back in 1998 when Jeorge Tripps modified an op-amp-powered fuzz circuit from 1978 for the band Oranger. Prized for its less pronounced scoop, Mr. Tripps refined its design for a tighter low end and more reliable performance when played live on stage. Many years later he would craft a handful of prototypes based on that modded original—and these would be the basis for the sonic sledge now called the Doom Hammer Fuzz. Output, Tone, and Fuzz dials allow you to tailor the pedal’s velvety harmonics to your rig. Try a low Fuzz setting for the most delightful crunch.

Take up the hammer. Pound the Way Huge Smalls Doom Hammer Fuzz into your pedalboard.

Features

  • Footswitch toggles effect on / bypass
  • (blue LED indicates on)
  • Output knob sets output level
  • Fuzz knob sets intensity of fuzz effect
  • Tone knob shapes EQ.
  • Input Impedance : 43 kΩ
  • Output Impedance : 650 Ω
  • Bypass : True Bypass
  • Current : Draw 8 mA
  • Power Supply : 9 VDC

Power

  • The Way Huge Smalls Doom Hammer Fuzz is powered by a single 9-volt battery (remove bottom plate to install), a 9-volt AC adapter such as the Dunlop ECB003, or an MXR® Brick Series power supply. The power input is a 5.5mm x 2.1mm jack with the positive voltage on the outer sleeve. Using an external power supply will disconnect the battery. Disconnect the input jack to preserve battery life when not in use

Posted By: ProAudioStar (Brooklyn, NY, United States) on October 15, 2025 at 04:45 PM
